vocab.example: I was drawn to Liberal Arts because it offers a significant breadth of knowledge across various disciplines.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt nghề nghiệp/thực hành
vocab.example: The vocational appeal of Nursing was the main driver behind my choice, as I wanted a hands-on career.

vocab.meaning: bàn đạp/bước đệm để đạt được điều gì
vocab.example: I view a degree in Economics as a vital stepping stone to a future role in global policy-making.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ/ham học hỏi
vocab.example: My choice was fueled by a deep intellectual curiosity about how the human brain processes language.

vocab.meaning: con đường sự nghiệp đem lại thu nhập cao
vocab.example: While I enjoy the subject, I cannot deny that Data Science is a particularly lucrative career path in today's economy.

vocab.meaning: khám phá/giải mã những bí ẩn của
vocab.example: I chose Astrophysics because I’ve always wanted to unravel the mysteries of the universe and black holes.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí tiên phong của
vocab.example: Studying Biotechnology allows me to be at the forefront of medical innovations and genetic research.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng có tính linh hoạt cao (áp dụng được nhiều nơi)
vocab.example: A History major provides highly transferable skills, such as critical analysis and persuasive writing.

vocab.meaning: sự mãn nguyện/hài lòng cá nhân
vocab.example: I prioritized personal fulfillment over financial gain when I decided to pursue a degree in Fine Arts.

vocab.meaning: tính chất liên ngành (kết hợp nhiều ngành)
vocab.example: The interdisciplinary nature of Environmental Science, combining law and biology, was what ultimately swayed me.
